about: Report an issue with documentation

---

## 📄 Documentation Issue

Which documentation has an issue?

- [ ] README.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Deployment guide
- [ ] API documentation
- [ ] Other (specify below)

## 🐛 What's Wrong?

Describe the issue with the documentation:

- [ ] Typo or grammar error
- [ ] Outdated information
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Unclear instructions
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Other

## 📝 Details

Provide specific details about the issue.

## 💡 Suggested Fix

If you have a suggestion for how to fix it, please share.

## 📍 Location

Link or path to the problematic documentation.

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I've checked that this documentation issue hasn't been reported
- [ ] I've identified the specific location of the issue
- [ ] I've explained what needs to be changed
